ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "games_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the game */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the game's cover image */,
  "categories_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game's category */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform the game is available on */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the game */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the game */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the game */,
  "esrb_rating" TEXT /* ESRB rating of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the game developer */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the game publisher */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "discount" REAL /* Current discount percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("games_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_categories_id FOREIGN KEY ("categories_id") REFERENCES categories ("categories_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "categories_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("categories_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the platform is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is active */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for deliveries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "games_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the game sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the sale */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied during the sale */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_games_id FOREIGN KEY ("games_id") REFERENCES games ("games_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Additional customer preferences */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the store */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the store is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., manager, sales associate) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the employee works */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is active */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "newsletter_subscription" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether the customer receives email notifications */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "preferred_store" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred store */,
  "preferred_payment_method" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_preferred_store FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_store") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_preferred_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Goal of the campaign */,
  "actual_spend" REAL /* Actual amount spent on the campaign */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_target_audience FOREIGN KEY ("target_audience") REFERENCES customer_preferences ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target customer */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
